name: jp.co.unvgi.vtuber-system-base.rac-movin-mocap-factory
description: Bridge package that provides the MOVIN MoCap source config factory for the RAC main output adapter. It depends on rac-main-output-adapter and realtimeavatarcontroller.movin, and is scoped to factory/provider integration without changing MOVIN runtime registration or Stub fallback behavior.
